form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a one length second over 400m Geelong in 23.02. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when second (25.93) over 450m at Warrnambool. Has a low draw and can measure up.

form.formComment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but she does have good record over this track and distance. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but she does have good record over this track and distance. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked in back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 2.25 lengths at Geelong (22.86) beating Pete Rennie in a Rank Limit - Maiden on April 7 four days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when second (23.48) over 400m at Warragul. Awkwardly drawn but capable of a better result.

form.formComment: Has struggled to find form of late. Last raced when eighth over 390m at this track a week-and-a-half ago. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at Bendigo over 425m (24.58) beating Paris Mash in Maiden on April 2. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a T3 Grade 7 on April 6 over 390m at this track behind Essendon Girl beaten 6 lengths (22.88). Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 7 length fourth over 410m at Horsham. Happy enough to avoid.
